meta.note: Future full event case studies. Not rendered on site yet. Gallery page continues to use gallery-stories.json for short story blocks. Add published items here when case-study UI ships.

section.title: Event stories
section.subtitle: Real events with context: who attended, what we ran, and what changed in the room.

items.title: Cross-department offsite, Ahmedabad
items.story: Three departments with little day-to-day overlap. Facilitator-led team rounds moved people across tables within the first 20 minutes. Participation stayed high through four structured challenges.

items.title: Annual society festival, Vadodara
items.story: Residents from toddlers to grandparents shared game queues instead of splitting by age. Rotating stations kept wait times short while the committee managed food and logistics.
